title: Mimecast - Block Sender Domain
content:
A playbook to block sender domain name using Mimecast integration.

Cortex XSOAR/XSIAM SOAR playbook from the Cortex XSOAR pack (Mimecast, xsoar-supported).

Inputs — BlockGroup: The sender domain block group.; SenderDomain: The sender domain to block.; QuerySource: The query source, please use "cloud" or "ldap" for this input..

Integrations/scripts used: IsIntegrationAvailable, mimecast-add-group-member, mimecast-find-groups.
